summary: Iteration 83: Tested Daily Prompt Buzz-In modal live search refactor. The BuzzInModal now uses a live search input (data-testid='buzz-record-search') instead of a Select dropdown, mirroring the 'Now Spinning' feature. All 9 features verified successfully.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Daily Prompt card renders on Hive page (data-testid='daily-prompt-card') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Clicking 'buzz in' button opens BuzzInModal - PASSED
FRONTEND: Modal contains search input NOT Select dropdown (data-testid='buzz-record-search') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Search input placeholder is 'search your collection...' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Typing 2+ characters shows matching results (data-testid='buzz-search-results') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Search has 300ms debounce implemented correctly - PASSED
FRONTEND: Typing query with no matches shows 'no results in your collection' (data-testid='buzz-no-results') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Clicking search result selects it and shows selected card (data-testid='buzz-selected-record') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Selecting record displays live preview (data-testid='buzz-preview') - PASSED
FRONTEND: 'post to the hive' button is disabled until record selected - PASSED
FRONTEND: 'post to the hive' button is enabled after record selected - PASSED
FRONTEND: Clicking X button deselects record and returns to search - PASSED
FRONTEND: After deselect, 'post to the hive' button is disabled again - PASSED
FRONTEND: ComposerBar and other Hive features still work correctly - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed filter bar visible - PASSED
FRONTEND: Posts render in feed (20 posts found) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: DailyPrompt.js: searchCollection function uses same scoring algorithm as ComposerBar.js (lines 101-126)
DailyPrompt.js: 300ms debounce implemented via buzzSearchTimer ref (line 104)
DailyPrompt.js: Results limited to top 10 matches (line 123)
DailyPrompt.js: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
MOCKED: Email sending via Resend is mocked
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with records in collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Prompt Buzz-In modal now uses live search input instead of Select dropdown. The user 'vinylcollector74' has at least one record ('Random Access Memories' by Daft Punk) that appears when searching 'da'. Daily Prompt is visible on /hive page when an active prompt exists. Test credentials: vinylcollector@honey.io / password123

mocked_integrations.email_sending: Resend email service is MOCKED - confirmation emails are logged but not sent
